rules.name: Focus of Hatred
rules.effect: At the start of your Command phase, select one unit from your opponent's army to be your focus of hatred. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time a HERETIC ASTARTES model from your army (excluding DAMNED models) makes an attack that targets your focus of hatred, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Endless Ire
stratagems.timing: Any phase, just after your focus of hatred is destroyed.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES CHARACTER unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units)
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit within 12" of and visible to your unit. Until the start of your next Command phase, that enemy unit is considered to be your focus of hatred.
stratagems.summary: No amount of bloodshed can truly satisfy this bitter champion's desire for vengeance.

stratagems.name: Contemptuous Disregard
stratagems.timing: Your opponents Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.summary: Such embittered warriors as these shrug off hails of enemy fire with arrogant disdain.

stratagems.name: Bringers of Despair
stratagems.timing: Start of the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units) that is within Engagement Range of your focus of hatred.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Fights First ability.
stratagems.summary: Fearful of countenance, these ancient warriors are redolent with warp power and radiate a horrifying aura of might.

stratagems.name: Black Crusade
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit or HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units).
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back, and bolt pistols, boltguns and combi-bolters equipped by models in your unit have the [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] ability while your unit has not already inflicted 6 wounds this turn using that ability.
stratagems.summary: The Warmaster s Black Crusade grinds ever onwards without restraint or remorse.

stratagems.name: Let the Galaxy Burn
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding TZEENTCH units) that has not been selected to shoot this phase
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability, and change the Attacks characteristic of Torrent weapons equipped by models in your unit to 6.
stratagems.summary: No barricade or fortification is proof against the vengeful fury of these hate-fuelled murderers.

stratagems.name: Millennia of Experience
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY or HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units) that is within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".
stratagems.summary: Thousands of years of ceaseless conflict have forged these warriors into skilled and merciless killers.

enhancements.name: Eager for Vengeance
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only (excluding DAMNED models). The bearer’s unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. Each time a model in the bearer’s unit makes an attack that targets your focus of hatred, if the bearer’s unit Fell Back this turn, add 1 to the Hit roll, and each time you select your focus of hatred as a target of that unit’s charge, add 1 to the Charge roll.

enhancements.name: Eye of Abaddon
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only (excluding DAMNED models). While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time your focus of hatred is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Mark of Legend
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only (excluding DAMNED models). Once per turn, you can re-roll one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one saving throw made for the bearer.

enhancements.name: Warmaster’s Gift
enhancements.effect: CHAOS LORD model only. Each time the bearer makes an attack that targets your focus of hatred, an unmodified successful Wound roll of 5+ scores a Critical Wound.

rules.name: Masters of Misdirection
rules.effect:
In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can select a number of LEGIONARIES and CULTIST MOB units from your army; until the end of the battle, those units, and any CHARACTER units attached to them (excluding EPIC HEROES), have the Infiltrator ability. The maximum number of units you can select in this way depends on the battle size, as shown below.
Battle Size | Legionaries | Cultist Mobs

Incursion | Up to 2 units | Up to 2 units
Strike Force | Up to 3 units | Up to 3 units
Onslaught | Up to 4 units | Up to 4 units

stratagems.name: Detonator
stratagems.timing: Any phase, just after an enemy model with the Deadly Demise ability (excluding TITANIC models) is destroyed
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES CHARACTER unit from your army that was within 18" of that enemy model when it was destroyed.
stratagems.effect: Your opponent does not roll to determine whether mortal wounds are inflicted by their model’s Deadly Demise ability. Instead, mortal wounds are automatically inflicted (if that ability inflicts a random number of mortal wounds, your opponent rolls to determine that number as normal).
stratagems.summary: These warriors employ expert saboteurs who utilise melta charges and improvised explosives to sow destruction.

stratagems.name: From All Sides
stratagems.timing: Start of your Charge phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to Charge rolls made for your unit for each other HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that made a Charge move this phase (to a maximum of +3)
stratagems.summary: When the assault comes, it does so swiftly and without warning.

stratagems.name: Pick Them Off
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is below its Starting Strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll. If the target is Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.
stratagems.summary: The Heretic Astartes are pitiless reavers, targeting weak points in the enemy line with ruthless efficiency.

stratagems.name: Coils of Deception
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.cond: That HERETIC ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back
stratagems.summary: Some Heretic Astartes are masters of deceit, often feigning retreat only to open fire from close range.

stratagems.name: Relentless Pursuit
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY or HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6".
stratagems.summary: These warriors stalk their assigned target with dogged determination, reacting to their every move

stratagems.name: Scrambled Coordinates
stratagems.timing: Start of the Reinforcements step of your opponent’s Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" horizontally of your unit.
stratagems.summary: Employing fell techno-sorcery, the Heretic Astartes disroot enemy navigational cogitators and scramble teleporter beacons.

stratagems.name: Scrambled Coordinates
stratagems.timing: Start of the Reinforcements step of your opponent’s Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" horizontally of your unit.
stratagems.summary: Employing fell techno-sorcery, the Heretic Astartes disroot enemy navigational cogitators and scramble teleporter beacons.

enhancements.name: Cursed Fang
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY model only. Improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of the bearer’s melee weapons by 1, and the bearer’s melee weapons have the [PRECISION] ability.

enhancements.name: Falsehood
enhancements.effect: CHAOS LORD model only (excluding TERMINATOR and JUMP PACK models). In the Declare Battle Formations step, you can set the bearer up in Reserves instead of setting it up on the battlefield. If you do, in the Reinforcements step of one of your Movement phases, you can select one model in a friendly LEGIONARIES or CHOSEN unit that has two or more models remaining and is on the battlefield (excluding Attached units). The selected model is destroyed (ignoring any rules that are triggered when a model is destroyed) and the bearer is set up as close as possible to where that model was destroyed and only within Engagement Range of any enemy units if the destroyed model was within Engagement Range of those units. The bearer now attaches to that unit as its Leader.

enhancements.name: Shroud of Obfuscation
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY model only. The bearer has the Stealth and Lone Operative abilities.

enhancements.name: Soul Link
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY model only. At the start of your Command phase, you can select one other HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY CHARACTER model from your army (excluding EPIC HEROES). Until the start of your next Command phase, the bearer gains the PSYKER keyword, and replace the bearer’s datasheet abilities with the datasheet abilities of the CHARACTER you selected.

rules.name: Raiders and Reavers
rules.effect: Ranged weapons equipped by HERETIC ASTARTES models from your army have the [ASSAULT] ability, and each time a HERETIC ASTARTES model from your army makes an attack that targets a unit within range of an objective marker, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.

stratagems.name: Unfailingly Obdurate
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.summary: Such is their determination to claim their due that these warriors will gladly weather a storm of fire.

stratagems.name: Scour and Seize
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit within range of an objective marker, that attack has the [PRECISION] ability.
stratagems.summary: If the bounty is to be claimed, the foe must first be purged.

stratagems.name: Opportunistic Raiders
stratagems.timing: End of the Fight phase
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that was eligible to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6", or up to 12" if it is a MOUNTED unit. Otherwise, your unit can make a Fall Back move. It cannot embark within a TRANSPORT at the end of this move if it disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn.
stratagems.summary: Mobility is the key to victory These Heretic Astartes raiders outmanoeuvre and outflank the foe in order to achieve victory.

stratagems.name: Warpcharged Engines
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES TRANSPORT or HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that has not been selected to move this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.
stratagems.summary: The engines of this vehicle or construct crackle with the raw energies of the immaterium, propelling it forward or incredible speed.

stratagems.name: Ruinous Raid
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or your Fight phase
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn and has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, if the target of that attack is within range of an objective marker, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.
stratagems.summary: Utilising their swift transports, these ravagers plunge through the enemy lines to assault key positions.

stratagems.name: Reavers’ Haste
stratagems.timing: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY or HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced. If you select one or more units within range of an objective marker as a target of that charge, add 1 to the Charge roll.
stratagems.summary: The prospect of riches spurs these renegade warriors forwards. Woe betide any in their path.

stratagems.name: Opportunistic Raiders
stratagems.timing: End of the Fight phase
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that was eligible to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: If your unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6", or up to 12" if it is a MOUNTED unit. Otherwise, your unit can make a Fall Back move. It cannot embark within a TRANSPORT at the end of this move if it disembarked from a TRANSPORT this turn.
stratagems.summary: Mobility is the key to victory These Heretic Astartes raiders outmanoeuvre and outflank the foe in order to achieve victory.

enhancements.name: Despot’s Claim
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if the bearer is wholly within 12" of your opponent’s deployment zone: on a 5+, you gain 1 CP.

enhancements.name: Dread Reaver
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, if the bearer is wholly within 12" of your opponent’s deployment zone, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Mark of the Hound
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. Models in the bearers unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

enhancements.name: Tyrant’s Lash
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. You can re-roll Advance rolls made for the bearer’s unit, and the bearer’s unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

rules.name: Terror Descends (Aura)
rules.effect:
In the Battle-shock step of your opponent's Command phase, if an enemy unit that is below its Starting Strength is within 12" of one or more HERETIC ASTARTES units from your army, that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.
Each time an enemy unit within 12" of one or more HERETIC ASTARTES units from your army takes a Battle-shock test, subtract 1 from the result.
Enemy units affected by this Detachment rule do not need to take any other Battle-shock tests in the same phase.

stratagems.name: Depthless Cruelty
stratagems.timing: Fight phase
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Battle-shocked and/or Below Half-strength, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.summary: Terror troops such as these inflict agonies upon their victims with malicious relish, targeting the weakened and wounded without pity

stratagems.name: Bloody Example
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army destroys a CHARACTER unit.
stratagems.cond: That HERETIC ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Each enemy unit within 12" of and visible to your unit must take a Battle-shock test.
stratagems.summary: The violent and bloody slaughter of the enemy’s leadership hurls their followers into abject panic.

stratagems.name: Pitiless Hunters
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Battle-shocked and/or Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.
stratagems.summary: These predatory warriors sense weakness as the hydra shark smells blood, sating their bloodlust upon the fearful and wounded.

stratagems.name: Relentless Terror
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.cond: That HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.
stratagems.summary: These warriors strike in screaming waves, each charge as brutal as the last.

stratagems.name: Screaming Descent
stratagems.timing: Reinforcements step of your Movement phase, from the second battle round onwards.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES JUMP PACK unit from your army that is in Reserves.
stratagems.effect: Set your unit up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 6" horizontally away from all enemy units, but until the end of the turn, it is not eligible to declare a charge. Then select one enemy INFANTRY or MOUNTED unit within 9" of and visible to your unit: that unit must take a Battle-shock test.
stratagems.summary: Jump pack borne warriors descend from the skies, terrifying screams emanating from their vox-grilles as they plummet towards their prey.

stratagems.name: Merciless Pursuit
stratagems.timing: End of your opponent’s Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that is not within Engagement range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit that Fell Back this turn and is within 6" of your unit. Your unit can declare a charge as if it were your Charge phase. When doing so, you can only select that enemy unit as the target of that charge (and only if it is an eligible target). Note that even if this charge is successful, your unit does not receive any Charge bonus this turn.
stratagems.summary: The Heretic Astartes allow none to flee the battle, pursuing their broken foes with relentless savagery.

enhancements.name: Eater of Dread
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result for each Battle-shocked enemy unit that is on the battlefield: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Night’s Shroud
enhancements.effect: CHAOS LORD model only (excluding TERMINATOR models). Models in the bearer’s unit have the Stealth ability.

enhancements.name: Warp-fuelled Thrusters
enhancements.effect: JUMP PACK CHAOS LORD model only. At the end of your opponent’s turn, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove the bearer’s unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Willbreaker
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. In the Fight phase, after the bearer has made its attacks, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

rules.name: Iron Fortitude
rules.effect: Each time a ranged attack targets a HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units), if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of that unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

stratagems.name: Persistent Assailants
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more attacks this phase and has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll, and if your unit is Below Half-strength you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.
stratagems.summary: These iron-willed warriors refuse to retreat, even i the face of overwhelming odds. Mounting losses serve only to drive them forward

stratagems.name: Brutal Attrition
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a melee attack is allocated to your unit, after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, roll one D6 (to maximum of six D6 per attacking unit): for each 4+, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound.
stratagems.summary: These implacable soldiers weather the enemy's fury before striking back in kind, to devastating effect.

stratagems.name: Pitiless Cannonade
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Below Half-strength, a successful unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit
stratagems.summary: These warriors focus their ire upon a wounded foe, combining fire to fell their target in a cavalcade of destructive force.

stratagems.name: Point-blank Destruction
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units and has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit’s ranged weapons (excluding Blast weapons) have the [PISTOL] ability.
stratagems.summary: Even in the press of combat, the Heretic Astartes bring heavy weapons to bear, shattering fortifications and obliterating enemy infantry.

stratagems.name: Steadfast Determination
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.
stratagems.summary: These warriors possess endless endurance and are capable of weathering untold hardships in order to destroy their foes.

stratagems.name: Siegecraft
stratagems.timing: Start of your opponents Charge phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit selects your unit as a target of a charge, subtract 2 from the Charge roll (this is not cumulative with any other negative modifiers to that Charge roll).
stratagems.summary: Veterans of countless grinding sieges, these Heretic Astartes repel and pin down wave after wave of foes with rapid boltgun fire and accurate artillery.

enhancements.name: Bastion Plate
enhancements.effect: CHAOS LORD model only (excluding JUMP PACK models). Once per battle round, when a saving throw is failed for the bearer’s unit, you can change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0.

enhancements.name: Iron Artifice
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY model only. The bearers weapons have the [ANTI-VEHICLE 4+] and [ANTI-FORTIFICATION 4+] abilities.

enhancements.name: Ironbound Enmity
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. Each time the bearer makes an attack while within range of an objective marker, add 1 to the Wound roll.

enhancements.name: Warp Tracer
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. In your Shooting phase, after the bearer has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of the phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

rules.name: Desperate Devotion
rules.effect:
Each time a DAMNED unit from your army with the Dark Pacts ability is selected to make a Normal or Advance move or declare a charge (excluding units that arrived from Reserves this turn) it can make a Desperate Pact. If it does, until the end of the phase, add 2" to the Move characteristic of models in that unit and add 2 to Charge rolls made for that unit.


Desperate Pacts
Each time a unit makes a Desperate Pact, it must first take a Leadership test; if that test is failed, the unit suffers D3 mortal wounds before any effects of the Desperate Pact are resolved.

stratagems.name: Chosen for Glory
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One DAMNED unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Desperate Pact. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll, and if your unit did not fail the resulting Leadership test when making that Desperate Pact, you can re-roll the Wound roll as well.
stratagems.summary: Within the massed ranks of a heretic cult, only a few are marked for greatness.

stratagems.name: Selfless Demise
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One DAMNED unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has resolved all of its attacks, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, roll one D6 on a 6, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound after all of its attacks have been resolved.
stratagems.summary: The zealous followers of the Dark Gods are devoted to the last. As death comes they strike a desperate final blow in hope of reward.

stratagems.name: Infernal Sacrifice
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One DAMNED unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Desperate Pact. If it does, your unit suffers D3 mortal wounds (in addition to any suffered for failing the resulting Leadership test), and until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of the melee weapons equipped by models in your unit, and if your unit did not fail the resulting Leadership test when making that Desperate Pact, until the end of the phase, improve the Strength characteristic of those weapons by 1 as well.
stratagems.summary: Those in thrall to the Dark Gods will gladly sacrifice their lives to draw the eye of their darkling patrons.

stratagems.name: Crazed Focus
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One DAMNED unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Desperate Pact. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1, and if your unit did not fail the resulting Leadership test when making that Desperate Pact, improve the Strength characteristic of that attack by 1 as well.
stratagems.summary: Sven in the grip of frothing madness, these heretics are murderous in the extreme

stratagems.name: Reckless Haste
stratagems.timing: Your Charge phase
stratagems.cond: One DAMNED unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.
stratagems.summary: Consumed by a desire to spill blood, these fanatical heretics hurl themselves towards the foe.

stratagems.name: Mortal Thralls
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected ts targets.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking units attacks, and one friendly DAMNED unit within 3" of your unit and visible to both your unit and the attacking unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, while your DAMNED unit is on the battlefield, each time your opponent would make a Wound roll for an attack that targets your HERETIC ASTARTES unit, if your DAMNED unit is visible to the attacking model and is an eligible target for that attack, no roll is made; instead, your DAMNED unit suffers a number of mortal wounds equal to the Damage characteristic of that attack.
stratagems.summary: Disciples of the Chaos Gods think nothing of sacrificing their lesser thralls to protect those of greater worth.

enhancements.name: Amulet of Tainted Vigour
enhancements.effect: DARK APOSTLE model only. In your Command phase, you can return up to D3 destroyed DAMNED models (excluding CHARACTER models) to the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Cultist’s Brand
enhancements.effect: DARK APOSTLE or DAMNED model only. If every other model in the bearer’s unit (excluding Dark Disciples) is DAMNED, you can re-roll Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

enhancements.name: Incendiary Goad
enhancements.effect: DARK APOSTLE or DAMNED model only. While the bearer’s unit is below its Starting Strength, add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by DAMNED models in that unit, and while that unit is Below Half-strength, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of those weapons as well.

enhancements.name: Warped Foresight
enhancements.effect: DARK APOSTLE or DAMNED model only. While the bearer is leading a unit with the Scouts 6" ability, every model in the bearer’s unit has the Scouts 6" ability.

rules.name: Debt to the Soulforge
rules.effect:
Each time a HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON VEHICLE model from your army makes a Dark Pact, it can invoke its contract. If it does, subtract 1 from the resulting Leadership test when making that Dark Pact and, until the end of the phase:
- Each time a model in that unit makes a ranged attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.
- Add 2 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by models in that unit.

stratagems.name: Desperate Pledge
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON VEHICLE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit invokes its contract, each time it makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.summary: A daemon construct may beseech the Arkifane for further aid, adding to its soul debt in return for greater might.

stratagems.name: Glut of Souls
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON VEHICLE unit from your army (excluding TITANIC units) that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit invokes its contract, each time it makes an attack that destroys an enemy model, roll one D6: on 5+, your unit regains 1 lost wound after all of its attacks have been resolved (to a maximum of 6 wound).
stratagems.summary: Wrh each soul harvested the bound daemon comes closer to settling its contract and earning freedom.

stratagems.name: Daemonic Possesion
stratagems.timing: Your Command phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES VEHICLE unit from your army (excluding DAEMON units).
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, your unit has the DAEMON keyword.
stratagems.summary: Those steeped in techno-sorcery may trammel daemonic entities within mechanical constructs.

stratagems.name: Unstoppable Rampage
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase or Charge phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES VEHICLE or VASHTORR THE ARKIFANE unit from your army that has not been selected to move or charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes Normal, Advance or charge move, it can move horizontally through terrain features as if they were not there.
stratagems.summary: The tortured machine spirits of Heretic Astartes vehicles are driven forward by their anguish.

stratagems.name: Predatory Pursuit
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Movement phase, just after an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall back move.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES VEHICLE or VASHTORR THE ARKIFANE unit from your army that is within 9" of that enemy unit and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to 6", but must end that move as close as possible to that enemy unit.
stratagems.summary: Corrupted Heretic Astartes Vehicles Pursue their prey with an animalistic determination.

stratagems.name: Feeding Frenzy
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Movement phase, when an enemy unit (excluding MONSTER and VEHICLES) is selected to Fall Back.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON VEHICLE or VASHTORR THE ARKIFANE unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) that is within Engagement Range of your units Falls Back, all models in that enemy unit must take a Desperate Escape test. When doing so, of that enemy unit is Battle-shocked, substract 1 from each of those tests.
stratagems.summary: The daemonic entities at the heart of possessed vehicles hunger for the life force of their enemies.

enhancements.name: Forge’s Blessing
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. In your Command phase, select one friendly HERETIC ASTARTES VEHICLE unit within 12" of the bearer. Until the start of your next Command phase, that unit has the Feel No Pain 6+ ability.

enhancements.name: Invigorated Mechatendrils
enhancements.effect: WARPSMITH model only. Add 4" to the bearer’s Move characteristic.

enhancements.name: Tempting Addendum
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. Each time a HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON VEHICLE unit from your army invokes its contract while within 3" of the bearer: If it suffers one or more mortal wounds as a result of that Dark Pact, add 1 to the number of mortal wounds it suffers.Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Soul Harvester
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. While the bearer is on the battlefield, each time an enemy unit within 12" of the bearer is destroyed, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

rules.name: Creations of Bile
rules.effect:
At the start of the battle, select which augmentations are active for HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY models (excluding DAMNED models) from your army until the end of the battle. To do so, either select one from the list below, or randomly determine two by rolling two D6. If FABIUS BILE is your WARLORD, when randomly determining your augmentations, you can re‑roll one or both of the dice. Duplicated augmentations have no additional effect.


1 - **Cholinergic Accelerants:** Add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model.
2 - **Hyperadrenal Infusion:** Add 2" to the Move characteristic of this model.
3 - **Paraneural Reactions:** Improve the Weapon Skill characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model by 1.
4 - **Supracutaneous Chitination:** Improve the Toughness characteristic of this model by 1.
5 - **Macrotensile Sinews:** Add 1 to the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by this model.
6 - **Ophthalmic Enhancement:** Improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by this model by 1

stratagems.name: Monstrous Visages
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time an attack targets your unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
stratagems.summary: Bile’s experimental ministrations have left these warriors as freakish monsters. Cursed with clusters of compound eyes, distended, fang-stuffed jaws or myriad other grotesqueries, they are hideous to behold.

stratagems.name: Masters Are Watching
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, subtracting 1 from the result if it is a DAMNED unit: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. That destroyed model can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.
stratagems.summary: Feeling the expectant gaze of Bile’s greatest creations from across the battlefield, transhuman and mortal warriors strive slavishly to impress.

stratagems.name: Specimens for the Spider
stratagems.timing: Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes a melee attack that targets a CHARACTER unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll. After your unit has fought, if one or more enemy CHARACTER models were destroyed as a result of those attacks, select one enemy unit within 6" of your unit. That enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test. If the enemy WARLORD was destroyed as a result of those attacks, each enemy unit within 6" of your unit must take a Battle-shock test instead.
stratagems.summary: The Clonefather’s agents are always searching for new test subjects. They strive to harvest the bodies of great leaders and champions, dragging them from battle and leaving the remaining foes utterly demoralised.

stratagems.name: Delayed Mutations
stratagems.timing: Your Command phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit (excluding DAMNED units) from your army.
stratagems.effect: Your unit suffers D3 mortal wounds. Then select one augmentation (see Experimental Augmentations). Until the start of your next Command phase, models in your unit have the selected augmentation in addition to any other augmentations they have.
stratagems.summary: Fabius Bile’s experiments are notoriously unstable. In the heat of battle, new mutations may burst forth in explosions of gristle and oozing gore, many of which are as lethal to the subject as they are to the enemy.

stratagems.name: Diabolic Regeneration
stratagems.timing: Your Command phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit (excluding DAMNED units) from your army.
stratagems.effect: One destroyed model (excluding CHARACTER models) is returned to your unit. If your unit is a BATTLELINE unit, D3 destroyed models (excluding CHARACTER models) are returned to your unit instead.
stratagems.summary: Not even death can lay the most vile of Bile’s creations low.

stratagems.name: Autostimulants
stratagems.timing: Start of your Charge phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.
stratagems.summary: Arrays of subdermal vials inject autostimulants and biocatalysts into the warriors’ enhanced muscles, invigorating them for incredible feats of exertion.

enhancements.name: Surgical Precision
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model (excluding DAMNED models) only. The bearer’s melee weapons have the [PRECISION] ability.

enhancements.name: Living Carapace
enhancements.effect: CHAOS LORD model only. Add 1 to the bearer’s Wounds characteristic and the bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability.

enhancements.name: Helm of All-seeing
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY model (excluding DAMNED models) only. Enemy units that are set up on the battlefield from Reserves cannot be set up within 12" of the bearer.

enhancements.name: Prime Test Subject
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY model (excluding DAMNED models) only. Add 1 to the Damage characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer. Each time the bearer makes a melee attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

stratagems.name: Eye of the Gods
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES CHARACTER unit from your army (excluding DAMNED, DAEMON and EPIC HERO units) destroys a enemy unit.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES CHARACTER model in that unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the battle, add 1 to the Move, Toughness and Wounds characteristics of that CHARACTER model, and add 1 to the Attacks. Strength and Damage characteristics of that CHARACTER model’s melee weapons.
stratagems.summary: The eyes of the Dark Gods fall upon those who slaughter in their name.

stratagems.name: Eternal Hate
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if it is a KHORNE unit: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. That destroyed model can fight after the attacking model’s unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.
stratagems.summary: The Blood God’s thirst can never be slaked.

stratagems.name: Profane Zeal
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES CHAOS UNDIVIDED unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Wound roll.
stratagems.summary: Those Heretic Astartes sworn to the service of the Dark Gods display zeal through violence.

stratagems.name: Skinshift
stratagems.timing: Your Command phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: One model in your unit regains up to 3 lost wounds. In addition, if your unit is a TZEENTCH unit below its Starting Strength, one destroyed model (excluding CHARACTER models) is returned to your unit with its full wounds remaining.
stratagems.summary: Those who offer praise to the God of Change may gam the benefits of his mutagenic powers.

stratagems.name: Torpefying Refrain
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back. If your unit is a SLAANESH unit, until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.
stratagems.summary: As these warriors traverse the battlefield, an unnatural symphony of hypnotic music accompanies their every move, stupefying their enemies.

stratagems.name: Festering Miasma
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the Stealth ability. In addition, if your unit is a NURGLE unit, it can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".
stratagems.summary: A roiling storm of warp energy obscures the Heretic Astartes, leaving their foes shooting at indistinct shadows.

enhancements.name: Eye of Tzeentch
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES TZEENTCH model only. Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Dark Pact and does not fail the resulting Leadership test, if the result of that test was 8 or more, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Intoxicating Elixir
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES SLAANESH model only. The bearer has the Feel No Pain 5+ ability. Each time the bearer shoots or fights, if the bearer’s unit made a Dark Pact this phase and did not fail the resulting Leadership test, after the bearer has resolved those attacks, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks; that enemy unit must take a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Orbs of Unlife
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES NURGLE model only. At the end of the Fight phase, roll one D6 for every enemy unit within 3" of the bearer, adding 1 to the result if the bearer’s unit made a Dark Pact that phase and did not fail the resulting Leadership test: on a 4+, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

enhancements.name: Talisman of Burning Blood
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES KHORNE model only. Add 1 to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearer’s melee weapons. Each time the bearer’s unit makes a Dark Pact and does not fail the resulting Leadership test, roll one D3: until the end of the phase, add the result to the Attacks and Strength characteristics of the bearers melee weapons instead.

stratagems.name: Baleful Blessing
stratagems.timing: Any phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army has a mortal wound allocated to it.
stratagems.cond: That HERETIC ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, models in your unit have the Feel No Pain 5+ ability against mortal wounds.
stratagems.summary: The powers of the cabal render these warriors semicorporeal for a short time, causing the most powerful attacks of their foes to simply pass through them as though they were smoke.

stratagems.name: No Rest in Death
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army within 9" of a HERETIC ASTARTES PSYKER, HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON PRINCE or HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON PRINCE WITH WINGS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: One model in your unit regains up to D3+1 lost wounds. If your unit has the BATTLELINE keyword, you can return up to D3 destroyed models (excluding CHARACTER models) to your unit with their full wounds remaining, instead.
stratagems.summary: With an imperious gesture, one of the army’s sorcerous masters conjures the wounded and dead back to their feet to fight on for their amusement.

stratagems.name: Mutation’s Curse
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES PSYKER unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one visible enemy unit within 12" of your unit. Roll one D6: on a 1, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound; on a 2-4, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 5-6, that enemy unit suffers 2D3 mortal wounds.
stratagems.summary: Surging warp energies coil around the foe and rapidly mutate them until their physical forms are rent asunder.

stratagems.name: Soulseekers
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot that phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.
stratagems.summary: These warriors have been gifted with hex-marked rounds that seek the living essence of their targets, leaving them nowhere to hide.

stratagems.name: Unholy Haste
stratagems.timing: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to charge that phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.
stratagems.summary: Hastened through the weave of time by sorcerous magicks, these warriors spring suddenly upon their foes.

stratagems.name: Shroud of Chaos
stratagems.timing: Start of your opponent’s Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES PSYKER, HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON PRINCE or HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON PRINCE WITH WINGS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit has the following ability: Shroud of Chaos (Aura): Models in friendly HERETIC ASTARTES units within 6" of this unit have the Stealth ability.
stratagems.summary: A conjured shroud of whirling shadows and supernatural mists veils the servants of the Dark Gods.

enhancements.name: Touched by the Warp
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only (excluding KHORNE models). The bearer gains the PSYKER keyword.

enhancements.name: Eyes of Z’desh
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability.

enhancements.name: Mind Blade
enhancements.effect: PSYKER model only. Melee weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [LANCE] ability.

enhancements.name: Infernal Avatar
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON PRINCE or HERETIC ASTARTES DAEMON PRINCE WITH WINGS model only. Improve the Strength characteristic of melee weapons equipped by the bearer by 2, and improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of those weapons by 1.

stratagems.name: Talons Sunk Deep
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Battle-shocked and/or Below Half-strength, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.summary: When indecision and terror grip the foe, their frailties are exposed to the cruelest of lunges.

stratagems.name: Prey on the Weak
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a unit that is Battle-shocked and/or Below Half-strength, you can re-roll the Hit roll.
stratagems.summary: Suitably wounded, or with the corpses of their comrades around them, the enemy’s faltering cohesion marks them as doomed.

stratagems.name: Sadistic Display
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army destroys an enemy unit.
stratagems.cond: That HERETIC ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Each enemy unit within 6" of and visible to your unit (excluding MONSTER and VEHICLE units) must take a Battle-shock test.
stratagems.summary: It is not enough to slay. The foe’s allies must understand exactly what horrors await them.

stratagems.name: Malicious Surge
stratagems.timing: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, your unit is eligible to declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.
stratagems.summary: Pairing unholy power with blistering speed, the full horror of these warriors’ strength is brought crashing into their foes.

stratagems.name: Relentless Terror
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY unit from your army Falls Back.
stratagems.cond: That HERETIC ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.
stratagems.summary: These warriors strike in screaming waves, each charge as brutal as the last.

stratagems.name: Horrific Incursion
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that arrived from Reserves this turn.
stratagems.effect: Select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTER and VEHICLE units) within 12" of and visible to your unit: that unit must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.
stratagems.summary: Accompanied by a burst of sensory torment, a sudden deployment can shatter the prey’s discipline.

enhancements.name: Greyveil Hex
enhancements.effect: CHAOS LORD model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Stealth ability. While the bearer’s unit is within range of one or more objective markers you control, that unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 18".

enhancements.name: Warp-fuelled Thrusters
enhancements.effect: CHAOS LORD JUMP PACK model only. At the end of your opponent’s Fight phase, if the bearer’s unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove the bearer’s unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

enhancements.name: Terrorglut Parasite
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. At the start of the Fight phase, each enemy unit within Engagement Range of the bearer must take a Battle-shock test, subtracting 1 from the result.

enhancements.name: Sorrowscent Vulture
enhancements.effect: CHAOS LORD JUMP PACK model only. Models in the bearer’s unit have the Scouts 6" ability. In the Declare Battle Formations step, the bearer can be attached to a WARP TALONS unit.

stratagems.name: Hardened Killers
stratagems.timing: Your Command phase.
stratagems.cond: One DAMNED unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Select one of the following effects: Improve the Ballistic Skill characteristic of ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.Improve the Attacks characteristic of Rapid Fire weapons equipped by models in this unit by 1.Improve the Save characteristic of models in this unit by 1.Until the start of your next turn, your unit has the benefit of that effect.
stratagems.summary: The mortals under Huron’s command have earned their place through bloody success on countless battlefields.

stratagems.name: At the Tyrant’s Command
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.
stratagems.summary: At Huron’s order, mortals and transhuman Renegades alike throw themselves into the heart of the battle.

stratagems.name: Seize the Prize
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) from your army has been selected to Advance.
stratagems.cond: That HERETIC ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Do not make an Advance roll for your unit. Instead, until the end of the phase add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in your unit.
stratagems.summary: After locating targets of opportunity, the Red Corsairs pursue them with shocking speed and relentless determination.

stratagems.name: Reavers’ Flurry
stratagems.timing: Your Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that made a Charge move this turn.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Attacks characteristics of melee weapons equipped by models in your unit.
stratagems.summary: The Red Corsairs excel in the furious violence of melee combat, butchering outmatched foes in a lethal flurry of steel.

stratagems.name: To the Favoured the Spoils
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that lost one or more wounds as a result of those attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Surge move. To do so, roll one D6: models in your unit move a number of inches up to the result, but your unit must end that move as close as possible to the closest enemy unit (excluding AIRCRAFT). When doing so, those models can be moved within Engagement Range of that enemy unit.
stratagems.summary: Huron and his spies are always watching and judging. Those that strive hardest to reach and destroy the Tyrant’s foes may earn a greater share of the plunder.

stratagems.name: Encircling Surge
stratagems.timing: End of your opponent’s Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) from your army that is within 6" of one or more battlefield edges and not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units.
stratagems.effect: Remove your unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.
stratagems.summary: As the fighting continues, these warriors slip away, moving to outflank and surround the embattled foe.

enhancements.name: Voice of the Tyrant
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only (excluding DAMNED models). The bearer’s unit has both abilities from the Tyrannical Motivation Detachment rule.

enhancements.name: Raid Leader
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only (excluding DAMNED models). Each time the bearer’s unit is set up after disembarking from a TRANSPORT that has made a Normal move this turn, the bearer’s unit is still eligible to declare a charge.

enhancements.name: Dread Reputation
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only (excluding DAMNED models). Each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield, each enemy unit within 6" of the bearer’s unit (or within 12" if the bearer’s unit was set up using the Deep Strike ability) takes a Battle-shock test.

enhancements.name: Eager for Bloodshed
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. The bearer has the Infiltrators ability.

stratagems.name: Never Outgunned
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that has just been selected to shoot or fight.
stratagems.effect: Select either the [LETHAL HITS] or [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability. Until the end of the phase, weapons equipped by models in your unit have the selected ability.
stratagems.summary: Centuries of combined combat experience enable these Renegade killers to eliminate any target, bringing down resilient foes by targeting weak points or reducing hordes of enemy infantry to bloody mist with rapid volleys.

stratagems.name: Vengeful Destruction
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES INFANTRY (excluding DAMNED units) or HERETIC ASTARTES MOUNTED unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit makes an attack that targets your Vendetta target, add 1 to the Wound roll.
stratagems.summary: Hatred is a powerful motivator. Those who cross Renegade Space Marines rarely live long enough to regret their actions.

stratagems.name: Undying Hatred
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit is destroyed, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove the destroyed model from play; it can fight after the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.
stratagems.summary: Freed from the Emperor’s yoke, these warriors are motivated only by bitter hatred, channelling their ire into every brutal strike: even their final one.

stratagems.name: Renegade Claim
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.
stratagems.summary: Renegades do not relinquish their prizes easily.

stratagems.name: Corrupted Munitions
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit in your army that has just been selected to shoot.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, improve the Armour Penetration of that attack by 1.
stratagems.summary: Without traditional methods of resupply and rearmament, Renegades must plunder or barter for their ammunition. Whether seized from the holds of captive vessels or acquired from daemonic arms dealers or xenos black marketeers, these munitions are horrifically effective.

stratagems.name: Reavers’ Reaction
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has shot.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) from your army that was hit by one or more of those attacks.
stratagems.effect: Your unit can make a Normal move of up to D6".
stratagems.summary: Reacting to incoming fire, traitorous infantry adjust their battle plan without breaking stride, moving to take cover or closing in upon their assailants with vengeance in mind.

enhancements.name: Weaponised Hatred
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. Once per battle round, after your Vendetta target is destroyed, if the bearer is on the battlefield, you can select one enemy unit visible to the bearer. That enemy unit becomes your Vendetta target until you select a new one.

enhancements.name: Eyes of the Hunter
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. Ranged weapons equipped by models in the bearer’s unit have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.

enhancements.name: Fratricidal Trophies
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES TERMINATOR model only. In a turn in which the bearer’s unit chose to Default to Doctrine, until the end of the turn, each time a model in this unit makes an attack, you can re-roll the Hit roll.

enhancements.name: Empyric Symbiote
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only. Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for the bearer’s unit.

stratagems.name: Empyric Dislocation
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase or the Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units) that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the attacking unit has finished making its attacks, each time an attack targets your unit, worsen the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.summary: These warriors have not quite escaped the grip of the Warp, remaining slightly incorporeal in a way that causes enemy fire to pass harmlessly through them.

stratagems.name: Armour of Corruption
stratagems.timing: Fight phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES TERMINATOR, OBLITERATORS or MUTILATORS unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, each time an attack is allocated to a model in your unit, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.
stratagems.summary: Drawn to the largest and toughest warriors by their inherent sense of might and superiority, overspilling warp energies make their conceit a resilient reality.

stratagems.name: Warp Flicker
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES TERMINATOR, OBLITERATORS or MUTILATORS unit from your army.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced.
stratagems.summary: Momentary flares of empyric energy wreathe this unit, causing them to stutter through time and space more swiftly.

stratagems.name: Warp-tainted
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES TERMINATOR, OBLITERATORS or MUTILATORS unit from your army, within range of an objective marker you control.
stratagems.effect: That objective marker remains under your control until your opponent’s Level of Control over that objective marker is greater than yours at the end of a phase.
stratagems.summary: Immaterial energies still cling to these warriors like tattered shrouds, leaving sites of significance tainted by their touch and haunted by insubstantial spectres.

stratagems.name: Siegebreaker Strike
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase.
stratagems.cond: Up to two HERETIC ASTARTES units from your army that were set up using the Deep Strike ability this turn and have not been selected to shoot this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in your units have the [IGNORES COVER] ability.
stratagems.summary: These warriors have drilled relentlessly in the art of laying down murderous fire against dug-in foes the moment they teleport into battle.

stratagems.name: Portal of Spite
stratagems.timing: Your Charge phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army that was set up using the Deep Strike ability this turn and has not declared a charge this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time your unit declares a charge, if the closest eligible enemy unit is selected as one of the targets of that charge, add 2 to the Charge roll.
stratagems.summary: The warp rift through which these warriors reach the battlefield has been directed toward chosen prey by a vengeful daemonic entity.

enhancements.name: Infernal Fulgurite
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only (excluding DAMNED models). Once per battle, you can target the bearer’s unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem this phase.

enhancements.name: Eye of the Warp
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model with the Deep Strike ability only. Each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield, until the end of the turn, you can re-roll Charge rolls made for that unit.

enhancements.name: Akshur’s Binding Runes
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model with the Deep Strike ability only. The bearer’s unit can be set up using the Deep Strike ability in the Reinforcements step of your first, second or third Movement phase, regardless of any mission rules.

enhancements.name: Tzagulla
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model with the Deep Strike ability only. Improve the Attacks, Strength and Armour Penetration characteristics of the bearer’s weapons by 1. In addition, each time the bearer’s unit is set up on the battlefield from Reserves, until the end of the turn, improve the Damage characteristic of the bearer’s weapons by 1.

stratagems.name: Touch of the Arkifane
stratagems.timing: Any phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units) that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, if your unit is selected to make a Dark Pact, you can select both abilities for that unit’s weapons to gain.
stratagems.summary: The blessings of Vashtorr flow through these  warriors’ weapons, infusing them with power and mutating them into still-deadlier forms.

stratagems.name: Balefire Boon
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One SOUL FORGE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack, improve the Armour Penetration characteristic of that attack by 1.
stratagems.summary: Channelling the infernal flames of the soul forges, this unit tears through its victims with blows and blasts that melt the toughest armour.

stratagems.name: Soul-tally Offering
stratagems.timing: Your Shooting phase or the Fight phase.
stratagems.cond: One SOUL FORGE unit from your army that has not been selected to shoot or fight this phase.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in your unit makes an attack that targets a CHARACTER, MONSTER or VEHICLE unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.
stratagems.summary: Offering up so great a sacrificial victim will surely win favour with the Arkifane, or go some way toward settling the looming debts already incurred to him.

stratagems.name: Biomechanoid Regeneration
stratagems.timing: Your Command phase.
stratagems.cond: One HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army (excluding DAMNED units).
stratagems.effect: One model in your unit regains up to D3 lost wounds. If your unit has the SOUL FORGE keyword, one model in your unit regains up to 3 lost wounds instead.
stratagems.summary: Metal and muscle, wire and sinew flow together, reknitting battle damage with sparking clots of repulsive mutant growth.

stratagems.name: Forge-fire Surge
stratagems.timing: Your Movement phase, just after a HERETIC ASTARTES unit from your army Advances.
stratagems.cond: That HERETIC ASTARTES unit.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Advanced. If your unit has the SOUL FORGE keyword, until the end of the turn, your unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced instead.
stratagems.summary: Warp-tainted motive force and empyric plasma flows through engine and living entity alike, driving them on even as it scours them from within.

stratagems.name: Unholy Fortitude
stratagems.timing: Your opponent’s Shooting phase, just after an enemy unit has selected its targets.
stratagems.cond: One SOUL FORGE unit from your army that was selected as the target of one or more of the attacking unit’s attacks.
stratagems.effect: Until the end of the phase, add 1 to the Toughness characteristic of models in your unit.
stratagems.summary: Responding swiftly to incoming fire, the bound entity within this daemon engine raises arcane wards to soak up the foe’s fury.

enhancements.name: Wyredjinn
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only (excluding DAMNED models). At the start of your Command phase, if the bearer is on the battlefield, roll one D6, adding 1 to the result if the bearer is within range of an objective marker you control: on a 4+, you gain 1CP.

enhancements.name: Cybinfernal Font
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only (excluding DAMNED models). Models in the bearer’s unit have the SOUL FORGE keyword.

enhancements.name: Mark of the Soul Forges
enhancements.effect: HERETIC ASTARTES model only (excluding DAMNED models). Each time the bearer makes an attack, an unmodified Hit roll of 5+ scores a Critical Hit.

enhancements.name: Crown of Worms
enhancements.effect: WARPSMITH model only. Add 3" to the range of the bearer’s Warpsmith, Master of Mechanisms and Enrage Machine Spirits abilities.
